# v19.8 Field House usability pass

- Preserved v19.7 Field House layout, collision zones, and interaction coordinates.
- Improved Field House object silhouettes only: brighter exit, clearer coach desk/W banner, medical recovery table, stronger mat landmark, larger GEAR sign, and simpler practice rack.
- Reduced top HUD dominance without changing HUD systems or gameplay mechanics.
- Kept Field House NPCs stationary/non-disruptive and clarified coach/recovery/shop wording.
- Did not redesign, add content, or touch Campus Quad, battle mechanics, recruiting, scouting, saves, or menus except version/cache sync.

Static route checklist reviewed: coach, recovery, mat, shop, meeting, weights/practice, exit. Root/dist sync and syntax checks passed.
